phrases.intent_en: Ask if cafe terraces charge table service fee
phrases.text_local: Účtujete si za servis u stolku?
phrases.cultural_note: Some terraces add a couvert or service fee, but it should be noted on the menu.

likely_response.local: Ano, k účtu připočítáváme deset procent.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, we add ten percent to the bill.

responses.english: Yes, we add ten percent to the bill.
responses.french: Ano, k účtu připočítáváme deset procent.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the street food kiosks close
phrases.text_local: Do kolika mají otevřeno stánky s občerstvením?
phrases.cultural_note: Closing times are flexible and depend on weather and crowd levels.

likely_response.translation_en: Usually around eleven in the evening.

responses.english: Usually around eleven in the evening.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Muzeum metro ticket machines are
phrases.text_local: Kde jsou automaty na lístky na Muzeu?
phrases.cultural_note: The Muzeum station vestibule is directly under the upper square end.

likely_response.local: Dole ve vestibulu, vpravo od eskalátorů.
likely_response.translation_en: Down in the vestibule, to the right of the escalators.

responses.english: Down in the vestibule, to the right of the escalators.
responses.french: Dole ve vestibulu, vpravo od eskalátorů.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how the currency exchange booth calculates rates
phrases.cultural_note: Always check the final amount before handing over money, as commission structures vary widely.

likely_response.local: Dle denního kurzu plus naše provize.
likely_response.translation_en: According to the daily rate plus our commission.

responses.english: According to the daily rate plus our commission.
responses.french: Dle denního kurzu plus naše provize.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Lucerna Palace passage is open
phrases.cultural_note: The Lucerna passage is a semi-public arcade, accessible even when shops are closed.

likely_response.local: Ano, pasáž je otevřená do půlnoci.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the passage is open until midnight.

responses.english: Yes, the passage is open until midnight.
responses.french: Ano, pasáž je otevřená do půlnoci.
